Package.Name: lsd
Package.Summary: The next generation ls command
Package.Description: The next generation ls command with a lot of pretty colors and icons.

Package.Name: budgie-wallpaper-switcher-applet
Package.Summary: Is an application (applet) to show a different wallpaper on each of the workspaces
Package.Description: Is an application (applet) to show a different wallpaper on each of the workspaces. Usage is simple; add the applet to the panel and set wallpapers on each of the workspaces in the way you are used to. The applet will remember what wallpaper was set on each of the workspaces.

Package.Name: python-humanfriendly
Package.Summary: Human friendly input/output for text interfaces using Python
Package.Description: Human friendly input/output in Python. The functions and classes in the humanfriendly package can be used to make text interfaces more user friendly.

Package.Name: qogir-gtk-theme-win
Package.Summary: Qogir is a flat Design theme for GTK
Package.Description: Qogir is a flat Design theme based on Arc gtk theme for Budgie, Gnome and Mate.

Package.Name: timeshift
Package.Summary: System restore tool for Linux.
Package.Description: System restore tool for Linux. Creates filesystem snapshots using rsync+hardlinks, or BTRFS snapshots. Supports scheduled snapshots, multiple backup levels, and exclude filters. Snapshots can be restored while system is running or from Live CD/USB.

Package.Name: budgie-showtime-applet
Package.Summary: Budgie Showtime is a digital desktop clock, showing time, and optionally, date.
Package.Description: Budgie Showtime is a digital desktop clock, showing time, and optionally, date. Textcolor of both can be set separately from the applet's menu.

Package.Name: budgie-workspace-stopwatch-applet
Package.Summary: Workspace Timer Applet is an applet to keep track of usage per workspace
Package.Description: Workspace Timer Applet is an applet to keep track of usage per workspace, e.g. to find out how much minutes/hours were actually spent on a job. Workspaces can be freely named, custom names and all data are rmembered, also after logout/restart, until the RESET button is pressed.

Package.Name: python-pikepdf
Package.Summary: A Python library for reading and writing PDF, powered by qpdf
Package.Description: Pikepdf is a Python library for reading and writing PDF files.

Package.Name: python-rx
Package.Summary: Reactive extensions for Python
Package.Description: A library for composing asynchronous and event-based programs using observable collections and query operator functions in Python

Package.Name: wmctrl
Package.Summary: wmctrl is a UNIX/Linux command line tool to interact with an EWMH/NetWM compatible X Window Manager
Package.Description: The tool provides command line access to almost all the features defined in the EWMH specification. It can be used, for example, to get information about the window manager, to get a detailed list of desktops and managed windows, to switch and resize desktops, to make windows full-screen, always-above or sticky, and to activate, close, move, resize, maximize and minimize them.

Package.Name: figlet
Package.Summary: FIGlet - display large characters made up of ordinary screen characters
Package.Description: FIGlet prints its input using large characters (called "FIGcharacters") made up of ordinary screen characters (called "sub-characters"). FIGlet output is generally reminiscent of the sort of "signatures" many people like to put at the end of e-mail and UseNet messages. It is also reminiscent of the output of some banner programs, although it is oriented normally, not sideways.

Package.Name: budgie-rotation-lock-applet
Package.Summary: Is an applet to an easy way to rotation lock or unlock your screen
Package.Description: Is an applet to an easy way to rotation lock or unlock your screen.

Package.Name: python-setuptools-scm-git-archive
Package.Summary: setuptools_scm plugin for git archives
Package.Description: This is a setuptools_scm plugin that adds support for git archives (for example the ones GitHub automatically generates).

Package.Name: gti
Package.Summary: Just a silly git launcher, basically
Package.Description: Just a silly git launcher, basically. Inspired by sl.

Package.Name: budgie-workspace-overview-applet
Package.Summary: An applet to have quick access to all windows across all workspaces
Package.Description: An applet to have quick access to all windows across all workspaces

Package.Name: wavemon
Package.Summary: Ncurses-based monitoring application for wireless network devices
Package.Description: wavemon is a wireless device monitoring application that allows you to watch signal and noise levels, packet statistics, device configuration and network parameters of your wireless network hardware. It should work (though with varying features) with all devices supported by the Linux kernel.

Package.Name: pdfarranger
Package.Summary: Small application to merge or split pdf documents and rotate, crop and rearrange their pages using an interactive and intuitive graphical interface
Package.Description: pdfarranger is a small python-gtk application, which helps the user to merge or split pdf documents and rotate, crop and rearrange their pages using an interactive and intuitive graphical interface. It is a frontend for python-pyPdf

Package.Name: budgie-another-trash-applet
Package.Summary: Trash is a Budgie Desktop applet for productivity.
Package.Description: Trash is a Budgie Desktop applet for productivity.

Package.Name: budgie-quickchar-applet
Package.Summary: Quickly find and choose the equivalent locale character for an ascii character
Package.Description: Quickly find and choose the equivalent locale character for an ascii character.

Package.Name: bandwhich
Package.Summary: Terminal bandwidth utilization tool
Package.Description: This is a CLI utility for displaying current network utilization by process, connection and remote IP/hostname

Package.Name: budgie-extras-daemon
Package.Summary: This on logon process manages keyboard shortcuts delivered via .bde files for various extras-plugins
Package.Description: This on logon process manages keyboard shortcuts delivered via .bde files for various extras-plugins.

Package.Name: odrive
Package.Summary: Google Drive GUI for Linux
Package.Description: This is a GUI client for Google Drive on linux application.

Package.Name: budgie-keyboard-autoswitch-applet
Package.Summary: Keyboard Auto Switch is an applet to use a different input keyboard layout per application
Package.Description: Keyboard Auto Switch is an applet to use a different input keyboard layout per application. Simply set a default layout to be used in general. Subsequently, simply set a different layout, with the application's window in front, and an exception for that specific application is remembered. Exceptions can be removed at any time, either from the applet's menu or by setting the application's layout, again, with its window in front.

Package.Name: qogir-gtk-theme-manjaro-win
Package.Summary: Qogir is a flat Design theme for GTK
Package.Description: Qogir is a flat Design theme based on Arc gtk theme for Budgie, Gnome and Mate.

Package.Name: budgie-takeabreak-applet
Package.Summary: Budgie TakeaBreak is a pomodoro like applet, to make sure to take regular breaks from working
Package.Description: Budgie TakeaBreak is a pomodoro like applet, to make sure to take regular breaks from working. Options from Budgie Settings include turning the screen upside down, dim the screen, lock screen or show a countdown message on break time. The applet can be accessed quickly from the panel to temporarily switch it off.

Package.Name: budgie-recentlyused-applet
Package.Summary: Show (Gtk applications') recently used items in a menu.
Package.Description: Show (Gtk applications') recently used items in a menu.

Package.Name: python-injector
Package.Summary: Python dependency injection framework, inspired by Guice
Package.Description: While dependency injection is easy to do in Python due to its support for keyword arguments, the ease with which objects can be mocked and its dynamic nature, a framework for assisting in this process can remove a lot of boiler-plate from larger applications. That's where Injector can help. It automatically and transitively provides dependencies for you.

Package.Name: budgie-fuzzyclock-applet
Package.Summary: Shows the time in a Fuzzy Way.
Package.Description: Shows the time in a Fuzzy Way.

Package.Name: pytest-isort
Package.Summary: py.test plugin to check import ordering using isort
Package.Description: py.test plugin to check import ordering using isort

Package.Name: budgie-brightness-controll-applet
Package.Summary: Brightness Controller is a Budgie Desktop applet for productivity.
Package.Description: Brightness Controller is a Budgie Desktop applet for productivity.

Package.Name: qogir-gtk-theme-ubuntu-win
Package.Summary: Qogir is a flat Design theme for GTK
Package.Description: Qogir is a flat Design theme based on Arc gtk theme for Budgie, Gnome and Mate.

Package.Name: crond
Package.Summary: crond (Dillon's lightweight cron daemon)
Package.Description: crond is a cron daemon written by Matt Dillon and continued by Jim Pryor that attempts to be as minimalist as possible.

Package.Name: budgie-window-mover-applet
Package.Summary: Budgie WindoMover is an application (applet) to quickly move windows to any of the other workspaces
Package.Description: Budgie WindoMover is an application (applet) to quickly move windows to any of the other workspaces. Just drag a window to the bottom of the screen and a bar will popup, representing the workspaces. Click on any of the numbers (or press the corresponding number on the keyboard), and the window will move to that workspace.

Package.Name: qogir-gtk-theme-manjaro
Package.Summary: Qogir is a flat Design theme for GTK
Package.Description: Qogir is a flat Design theme based on Arc gtk theme for Budgie, Gnome and Mate.

Package.Name: qogir-gtk-theme-ubuntu
Package.Summary: Qogir is a flat Design theme for GTK
Package.Description: Qogir is a flat Design theme based on Arc gtk theme for Budgie, Gnome and Mate.

Package.Name: gst
Package.Summary: System utility designed to stress and monitor various hardware components
Package.Description: GST (GtkStressTesting) is a GTK system utility designed to stress and monitor various hardware components like CPU and RAM.

Package.Name: numlockx
Package.Summary: Turns on the numlock key in X11
Package.Description: Turns on the numlock key in X11

Package.Name: python-cssselect2
Package.Summary: CSS selectors for Python ElementTree
Package.Description: cssselect2 is a straightforward implementation of CSS3 Selectors for markup documents (HTML, XML, etc.) that can be read by ElementTree-like parsers (including cElementTree, lxml, html5lib, etc.)

Package.Name: qogir-gtk-theme
Package.Summary: Qogir is a flat Design theme for GTK
Package.Description: Qogir is a flat Design theme based on Arc gtk theme for Budgie, Gnome and Mate.

Package.Name: budgie-dropby-applet
Package.Summary: The DropBy applet pops up in the panel on the occasion of connecting a usb device
Package.Description: The DropBy applet pops up in the panel on the occasion of connecting a usb device. The applet subsequently offers the option(s) to mount, unmount/eject, and, in case of a flash drive, to make a local copy of the drive's content. The info shows the free sapace on the volume. The applet shows its icon in the panel if, and as long as, any usb drive is connected.

Package.Name: budgie-app-launcher-applet
Package.Summary: App Launcher is a Budgie Desktop applet for productivity. This applet lists your favourite apps.
Package.Description: App Launcher is a Budgie Desktop applet for productivity. This applet lists your favourite apps.

Package.Name: variety-slideshow
Package.Summary: A pan-and-zoom image slideshow in Python, using Clutter
Package.Description: A pan-and-zoom image slideshow in Python, using Clutter

Package.Name: python-tinycss2
Package.Summary: Low-level CSS parser for Python
Package.Description: tinycss2 is a low-level CSS parser and generator: it can parse strings, return Python objects representing tokens and blocks, and generate CSS strings corresponding to these objects.
